name: GD Auto-Clipper
description: Automatically saves an OBS replay clip (with game audio + mic) of the runs you choose - full clears, or any start% to end%. Press F4 to set up.

rules.name: Record rules
rules.description: Comma-separated A-B ranges. Records any run that started at or before A% AND reached at least B%. Examples: 0-100 = only full clears. 43-100 = any run from <=43% that finishes. Multiple: 0-100, 43-100

practice.name: Record in practice mode
practice.description: If off (default), completions in practice mode are ignored.

pad-before.name: Seconds before run
pad-before.description: Extra footage kept BEFORE the run started (only applies when ffmpeg trimming is active).

pad-after.name: Seconds after run
pad-after.description: How long to keep recording after a run matches (so the win/death lands in the clip) before saving the replay buffer.

ffmpeg-path.name: ffmpeg path (optional)
ffmpeg-path.description: Path to ffmpeg, used to auto-trim clips to the run length. Leave blank to auto-detect (~/bin, Homebrew, /usr). Without ffmpeg, clips are the full replay-buffer length.

obs-host.name: OBS host
obs-host.description: OBS WebSocket host. Leave as localhost unless OBS runs on another machine.

obs-port.name: OBS port
obs-port.description: OBS WebSocket port (Tools > WebSocket Server Settings). Default 4455.

obs-password.name: OBS password
obs-password.description: OBS WebSocket password (Tools > WebSocket Server Settings > Show Connect Info). Leave blank only if you disabled authentication.
